overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban environment beneath massive highway overpasses during golden hour. The player navigates from a restricted building entrance through open plazas and pedestrian walkways, crossing streets with flying vehicles overhead and futuristic billboards lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under industrial building with restricted access

events.description: turns right corner moving from covered building entrance toward open highway underpass

agents.ego_description: walking along covered walkway past NO ENTRY signs and turning right around building corner

entered.detail: large industrial building with yellow and gray facade providing overhead cover
illuminated red neon sign reading NO ENTRY above restricted access gate
massive concrete highway structure with multiple levels visible in the distance
large blue structural column supporting the building overhang
triangular traffic cones blocking off restricted area near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered industrial building entrance with prominent red NO ENTRY signage. The camera moves forward along a concrete walkway, passing blue structural columns and orange traffic cones, then turns right to exit the sheltered area toward an open highway underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza beneath multi-level highway interchange

events.description: futuristic flying vehicle descends from sky and hovers near highway overpass
camera moves from building shadow into direct golden hour sunlight creating lens flare

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza beneath highway overpasses, observing the flying vehicle overhead

notable_agents.action: futuristic flying car hovering and descending near the highway structure

entered.detail: green metal railings lining the edge of the walkway
tall modern building with reflective glass facade visible through highway structure
massive cylindrical support pillars holding up the highway deck
large vertical digital billboard displaying CIRCUS advertisement with character image

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast plaza beneath towering highway overpasses. A futuristic flying vehicle hovers overhead near the concrete structure while golden hour sunlight creates dramatic lens flares. The camera approaches a large digital billboard advertising CIRCUS as it walks along the concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with advertising displays

events.description: passes large vertical billboard and continues along curved walkway beneath overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along covered pedestrian path beneath highway, passing other pedestrians and following the curved walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead on the path carrying a bag

entered.detail: long wall with multiple sequential advertisement billboards

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the shadow of the highway overpass, the path curves gently with massive concrete pillars lining the route. The CIRCUS billboard looms large on the right while other pedestrians walk ahead. The lighting shifts to diffused shadows under the concrete deck, with distant mountains visible through the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection beneath highway overpass with traffic control

events.description: begins crossing the street at crosswalk as traffic signal shows green walk indicator
vehicles pass by on the road while continuing to cross the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the intersection, navigating between passing vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road approaching the intersection
white car with headlights on passing by the crosswalk

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing green walk indication
marked pedestrian crossing with white stripes on asphalt
multi-lane street surface with vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: Approaching the intersection, the camera crosses the asphalt street at the marked crosswalk. Traffic lights show green for pedestrians while cars pass by on the road. The highway overpass structure shifts to the left as the crossing continues, with billboards visible on the far side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside busy road under curved highway ramp

events.description: turns slightly to follow the sidewalk curve along the ascending highway ramp

agents.ego_description: continuing along sidewalk parallel to traffic, passing under curved highway ramps with vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines
curved ascending highway ramp with concrete structure

segments.scene_description: Now on the far side of the intersection, the walk continues along a concrete sidewalk beneath curved highway ramps. Vehicles pass by on the adjacent road while electrical transmission towers rise in the background. The path curves gently following the highway structure as the sun casts long shadows across the pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a restricted industrial entrance into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban plaza beneath massive highway overpasses. It begins under a sheltered building entrance marked by red no-entry signs, moving past blue columns and orange cones before turning right to emerge into the open air. As the camera enters the vast plaza, the scene opens up to reveal towering concrete structures and a hovering flying vehicle, with the lighting shifting into dramatic golden hour lens flares that illuminate a large digital billboard advertising Circus. The path then curves through the diffused shadows of the overpass pillars and across a marked asphalt intersection where pedestrian lights glow green and cars pass by. Finally, the movement continues along a concrete sidewalk beneath curved highway ramps, passing electrical transmission towers as the sun casts long shadows across the pavement.
